mapper.select: select count(1) from lkt_record as a left join lkt_user as c on c.user_id = a.user_id

choose.when: and (a.type = 1 or a.type = 14 or a.type = 11) and d.money_type_name != 10

sql.if: AND (c.user_id like concat('%',#{key},'%') or c.user_name like concat('%',#{key},'%') or c.mobile like concat('%',#{key},'%'))

mapper.select: select ifnull(sum(a.money),0) from lkt_record as a left join lkt_user as c on c.user_id = a.user_id left join lkt_record_details d on a.details_id = d.id
select count(1) from lkt_record as a left join lkt_user as c on c.user_id = a.user_id left join lkt_record_details d on a.details_id = d.id
select count(distinct a.id) from lkt_record as a left join lkt_user as c on c.user_id = a.user_id
select ifnull(sum(a.money),0) from lkt_record as a left join lkt_user as c on c.user_id = a.user_id
select count(1) from lkt_sign_record as a left join lkt_user as c on c.user_id = a.user_id
